title: CCEM APM Concurrency Abstraction + Native macOS IPC Bridge
description: Unified concurrency layer (Task.Supervisor + JobQueue) and Unix Domain Socket transport for push-based CCEMHelper updates. Replaces 3s REST polling with server-push over UDS + Darwin notifications.

stories.title: ApmV5.ConcurrencyLayer - Task.Supervisor wrappers
stories.description: Fire-and-forget, bounded async stream, supervised tasks. Replaces raw Task.start calls. Telemetry events on task lifecycle.

stories.title: ApmV5.JobQueue GenServer with priority + retry
stories.description: ETS-backed :job_queue with priority levels, max_concurrent, exponential backoff retry.

stories.title: ApmV5.NativeTransport.UnixSocket listener
stories.description: gen_tcp UDS listener at /tmp/ccem-apm.sock, length-prefixed ETF framing.

stories.title: Telemetry instrumentation on hot paths
stories.description: :telemetry spans on PendingDecisions, PubSub broadcast, AuthorizationGate, AgentRegistry.

stories.title: CCEMHelper UnixSocketTransport actor
stories.description: NWConnection unix endpoint actor with AsyncStream<Frame> event source.
